# Obsidian Tags

Here is a basic inline tag: #tag

Here is a nested tag: #nested/tag

Multiple tags in a sentence: We can use #important and #review together.

Tags at the end of sentence: This is cool #awesome.

Invalid tags that shouldn't parse:
# 123 (Heading)
#invalid!tag (Only `#invalid` should parse)
email@example.com#hash (No space before)
